title: libpod: avoid nil pointer dereference in (*Container).Cleanup
body:
On FreeBSD, c.config.Spec.Linux is not populated - in this case, we can assume that the container is not using a pid namespace.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

This fixes a crash on FreeBSD when using 'podman stop'. On Linux it should be a no-op.

```release-note
None
```
